posts.author: Chandragupta
posts.community: Investing Basics - Feel free to ask the most basic questions
posts.text: Internal transfer between self demat accounts will not show up if PAN is the same. Usually it is selling & buying again, for whatever reason such as tax related, transfer between different accounts within the same group / family etc. or just to generate accounting entries for some reason or simply changing view on the stock due to happening / non happening of an event or something else.

posts.author: Garuna
posts.community: Investing Basics - Feel free to ask the most basic questions
posts.text: Sometimes we see that the in one quarter let’s say the holding is 4.11%, then the next quarter it disappears, and the following quarter the exact same percentage comes back. What’s going on here? It’s a reporting issue? Can’t be selling and buying again, the exact percentage. Guess it could be internal transfer between self demat accounts…

posts.author: Chandragupta
posts.community: Investing Basics - Feel free to ask the most basic questions
posts.text: It means the holding has gone below 1 %

posts.author: Garuna
posts.community: Investing Basics - Feel free to ask the most basic questions
posts.text: Hi If we go to investors section of a company page and see public investors, suppose: Mr. X is shown to hold 2% of a company in March 25 Then September 25 onwards it shows blank. Does this mean Mr. X still holds 2% or has his holding gone down below 1%?
